creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Created attachment 244536
Git-formatted patch

Here is a patch based on Michael Z's patch incorporated recent updates from devel/maven:
[00:00:31] Installing devel/maven39 | maven39-3.9.4
[124-release-amd64-default-head] Installing maven39-3.9.4...
[124-release-amd64-default-head] Extracting maven39-3.9.4: 100%
[00:00:32] Installing local Pkg repository to /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos
[00:00:32] Remounting /usr/ports read-write
[00:00:33] Mounting logs from: /var/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/124-release-amd64-default-head/2023-08-31T22:25:02
[00:00:33] Entering interactive test mode. Type 'exit' when done.
Welcome to Poudriere interactive mode!

PORTSDIR:               /usr/ports
Work directories:       /wrkdirs
Distfiles:              /distfiles
Packages:               /packages
Build logs:             /logs
Lookup port var:        make -V WRKDIR

ORIGIN:                 devel/maven39
PORTDIR:                /usr/ports/devel/maven39
WRKDIR:                 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/maven39/work
Installed packages:     maven39-3.9.4

It is recommended to set these in the environment:
setenv DEVELOPER 1
setenv DEVELOPER_MODE yes

Packages from /packages can be installed with 'pkg add' as needed.

If building as non-root you will be logged into nobody.
su can be used without password to elevate.

To see this again: cat /etc/motd
nobody@124-release-amd64-default-head:/usr/ports/devel/maven39 % mvn -v
Apache Maven 3.9.4 (dfbb324ad4a7c8fb0bf182e6d91b0ae20e3d2dd9)
Maven home: /usr/local/share/java/apache-maven-3.9
Java version: 1.8.0_382, vendor: OpenJDK BSD Porting Team, runtime: /usr/local/openjdk8/jre
Default locale: en_US, platform encoding: US-ASCII
OS name: "freebsd", version: "12.4-release-p2", arch: "amd64", family: "unix"
nobody@124-release-amd64-default-head:/usr/ports/devel/maven39 %
